description: From the manufacturer 1/2″ & 3/4″ Outdoor Tap Connector Hozelock 1/2” & 3/4″ BSP outdoor tap connector suitable for use with 95% of all outdoor taps. 1/2″ & 3/4″ Outdoor Tap Connector Hozelock’s 3/4″ & 1/2″ BSP Threaded Tap Connector includes a 1/2″ BSP adaptor for older taps. The connector securely attaches by fastening it onto the end of the outdoor tap, enabling you to connect a hose to the tap. Key Benefits Include: Made from the highest quality materials for increased durability Includes adaptor for older tap styles Quick and simple to install Universal male hose end connector for simple attachment to your Hozelock System How to measure your garden tap? There are multiple garden tap sizes and Hozelock offers a tap connector for every size, but which is the right one for your tap? Measuring your tap and buying the correct tap adapter can be confusing, as the measurement used is sized according to the standard British Standard Pipe, also known as BSP. This measurement refers to the size of the internal diameter of the pipe. So when you measure the outside diameter of your tap’s thread this doesn’t correspond to the BSP – refer to our handy conversion guide to ensure you purchase the correct connector. 1/2″ & 3/4″ Outdoor Tap Connector 1" Outdoor Tap Connector 1/2" Metal Outdoor Tap Connector Pro 1/2″ & 3/4″ Metal Outdoor Tap Connector Pro 1” Metal Outdoor Tap Connector Pro Dual Tap Connector Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,285 4.2 out of 5 stars 569 4.1 out of 5 stars 98 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,383 4.4 out of 5 stars 244 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,589 Price £5.29 £ 5 . 29 £7.59 £ 7 . 59 £15.31 £ 15 . 31 £8.55 £ 8 . 55 — no data £13.98 £ 13 . 98 Thread 1/2 Inch, 3/4 Inch 1 Inch 1/2 Inch 1/2 Inch, 3/4 Inch 1 Inch 1/2 Inch, 3/4 Inch Connector Type Tap Connector Tap Connector Tap Connector Tap Connector Tap Connector Tap Connector Material Plastic Plastic Metal Metal Metal Plastic Tap Location Outdoor Outdoor Outdoor Outdoor Outdoor Outdoor Outlet Single Single Single Single Single Multiple
